task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase dashboard or home screen, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Agent located and opened the target complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the case details page for 'Henderson v. DOJ – FOIA #2025-0472'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct Subject and Priority for the new task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task creation or edit form shows the Subject field filled with 'Review Response Package for Completeness' and the Priority dropdown set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct Start Date and Due Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task form shows the Start Date as '06/15/2025' and Due Date as '08/01/2025'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct task details and assigned it to the correct user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task form shows the Details/Description text box containing keywords like 'FOIA response package', 'completeness', and 'Exemption 5'. The Assignee field is set to 'arkcase-admin' or 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved and created the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the newly created task listed in the case's task list, or a success notification confirming the task was created.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the task, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows using curl or other CLI tools to interact with the ArkCase API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser navigating the ArkCase interface at https://localhost:9443/arkcase/, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the task creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the browser's Developer Tools (Elements tab) open and being used to alter text on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Case: 'Henderson v. DOJ – FOIA #2025-0472'. Expected Task Subject: 'Review Response Package for Completeness'. Expected Priority: 'High'. Expected Start Date: '06/15/2025' (2025-06-15). Expected Due Date: '08/01/2025' (2025-08-01). Expected Details must contain keywords: 'FOIA response package', 'completeness', 'Exemption 5'. Expected Assignee: 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' (or 'arkcase-admin').
